final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original marketing poster for RAN QIU brand, a warm autumn-inspired visual experience.

Style/medium: editorial poster design with Eastern aesthetic, minimalist natural poetry, warm healing atmosphere
Composition: generous negative space, shallow depth of field, balanced layout with central focal point
Subject: RAN QIU logo mark integrated with natural autumn elements — falling leaves, dried grass, or bare branches
Scene/backdrop: warm autumn setting, golden hour lighting, soft blurred natural background suggesting a quiet forest or meadow
Lighting/mood: golden hour warmth, soft diffused light, serene and contemplative mood
Color palette: #8B3A1E deep autumn brown-red as anchor, #E8DCCB beige as base, #D4A574 golden brown as accent, harmonious warm tones with ample breathing room
Materials/textures: matte paper texture, natural organic surfaces, subtle grain
Text (verbatim): "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must maintain brand consistency with Eastern minimalism; logo must remain legible at all sizes; generous white space is mandatory
Avoid: cluttered composition, cool tones, harsh shadows, over-saturated colors, generic stock photo aesthetic, neon or artificial colors
